name: PER_LOCATION_DETAILS_F
description: PER_LOCATION_DETAILS_F stores the location details related attributes.

columns.Name: LOCATION_DETAILS_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Represents whether or not the location is active.

columns.Name: LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_LOCATIONS table.

columns.Name: MAIN_ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the ID of the address for the location.

columns.Name: TELEPHONE_NUMBER_1
columns.Comments: Represents the main phone number for the location.

columns.Name: MAINPHONE_COUNTRY_CODE1
columns.Comments: Represents the country code of the main phone number for the location.

columns.Name: MAINPHONE_AREA_CODE1
columns.Comments: Represents the area code of the main phone number for the location.

columns.Name: MAINPHONE_SUBSCRIBER_NUM1
columns.Comments: Represents the local number of the main phone number for the location.

columns.Name: MAINPHONE_EXTENSION1
columns.Comments: Represents the extension of the main phone number for the location.

columns.Name: TELEPHONE_NUMBER_2
columns.Comments: Represents the fax number for the location.

columns.Name: FAX_COUNTRY_CODE2
columns.Comments: Represents the country code of the fax number for the location.

columns.Name: FAX_AREA_CODE2
columns.Comments: Represents the area code of the fax number for the location.

columns.Name: FAX_SUBSCRIBER_NUM2
columns.Comments: Represents the local number of the fax number for the location.

columns.Name: FAX_EXTENSION2
columns.Comments: Represents the extension of the fax number for the location.

columns.Name: TELEPHONE_NUMBER_3
columns.Comments: Represents the other phone number for the location.

columns.Name: OTHERPHONE_COUNTRY_CODE3
columns.Comments: Represents the country code of the other phone number for the location.

columns.Name: OTHERPHONE_AREA_CODE3
columns.Comments: Represents the area code of the other phone number for the location.

columns.Name: OTHERPHONE_SUBSCRIBER_NUM3
columns.Comments: Represents the local number of the other phone number for the location.

columns.Name: OTHERPHONE_EXTENSION3
columns.Comments: Represents the extension of the other phone number for the location.

columns.Name: OFFICIAL_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Represents the code of the location's official language.

columns.Name: EMAIL_ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Represents the email address of the location.

columns.Name: SHIP_TO_SITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the location is a ship to site.

columns.Name: SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the ID of the ship to site location.

columns.Name: RECEIVING_SITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the location is a receiving site.

columns.Name: BILL_TO_SITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the location is a bill to site.

columns.Name: OFFICE_SITE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates the location is an office site.

columns.Name: INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the inventory organization id the location is attached.

columns.Name: DESIGNATED_RECEIVER_ID
columns.Comments: Represents the designated receiver for this location.

columns.Name: GEO_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: The system identifier of a geography tree node.

columns.Name: GEO_HIERARCHY_NODE_VALUE
columns.Comments: The value of the of a geography tree node that this location references.

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_HOURS
columns.Comments: Number of standard working hours

columns.Name: STANDARD_WORKING_FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Frequency for the standard working hours

columns.Name: STD_ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION
columns.Comments: The standard annual working duration for the location.

columns.Name: ANNUAL_WORKING_DURATION_UNITS
columns.Comments: The unit of measure in hours, days, weeks, or months for the standard annual working duration.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.
